scripts.lint: eslint App.tsx appConfig.ts components hooks tests index.tsx types.ts utils services scripts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js
scripts.lint:fix: eslint App.tsx appConfig.ts components hooks tests index.tsx types.ts utils services scripts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js --fix
scripts.format:check: prettier --check App.tsx appConfig.ts "components/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "hooks/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "scripts/**/*.{ts,mjs}" "tests/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "utils/**/*.ts" eslint.config.js package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.format:fix: prettier --write App.tsx appConfig.ts "components/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "hooks/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "scripts/**/*.{ts,mjs}" "tests/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "utils/**/*.ts" eslint.config.js package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && node --import tsx/esm --test scripts/tests/*.test.mjs && npm run test:ui
